top_findings.summary: The skill description includes broad tool permissions ['pw/*', 'c7/*'] that are undefined and potentially sensitive (possibly password/credential access). These tools are not explained in relation to the stated purpose of building multi-agent systems. Additionally, while Azure authentication is expected for cloud services, the skill requests wide-ranging permissions (execute, edit, web access, memory, todo) without clear boundaries or necessity correlation with hybrid agent orchestration. The skill's building-block nature means integrators must implement their own authentication, yet the base skill requests potentially excessive system access.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The skill description includes broad tool permissions ['pw/*', 'c7/*'] that are undefined and potentially sensitive (possibly password/credential access). Additionally, while Azure authentication is expected for cloud services, the skill requests wide-ranging permissions (execute, edit, web access, memory, todo) without clear boundaries or necessity correlation with hybrid agent orchestration.
